author: lu_pinto
content: Hey <@427491045308235776> wondering in the [zkvm standards](https://github.com/eth-act/zkvm-standards/blob/main/standards/riscv-target/target.md) why the extensions for floating points (F and D) were left out? I may be late to this train but just wanted to know why. AFAIK they do not depend on OS specifics and just allow for additional bare metal instructions. I don't have a concrete prover case for adding them but I'm just curious as to why the team took the path of restricting rather than relaxing since still bare metal, and we never know what the future holds.
